summary:
GLOBAL AND SOCIETAL WARNINGS: Brandon discusses upcoming crackdowns on freedom of speech, specifically mentioning Canada, England, and Australia. He notes a recent crackdown on hate speech in Australia and references protests involving farming equipment being used against law enforcement.

DOMESTIC AND INTERNATIONAL SECURITY THREATS: Brandon shares detailed warnings about potential attacks on major cities and locations, including New York, Miami, New Orleans, Las Vegas, and Los Angeles. He mentions specific landmarks such as Times Square, Bourbon Street, Jackson Square, the Sugar Bowl, the Bellagio, Trump Towers, and Rodeo Drive. In Europe, he notes potential threats near the Eiffel Tower, involving a large black swan on the river, and areas in London including Big Ben. Furthermore, Brandon recounts instances of individuals casing locations for future attacks, including Salt Lake City, Six Flags in Arlington, a Houston megachurch, the Vatican, and major European synagogues.

ECONOMIC FORECASTS AND POLITICAL OBSERVATIONS: Brandon details economic predictions, describing an impending shallow wave of artificial stimulation in the housing market, cryptocurrency, gold, and silver. He advises readiness for this temporary boom and notes that the American dollar is facing trouble. Additionally, Brandon shares observations regarding political figures, noting a decrease in Hillary Clinton's influence, alongside mentions of Emmanuel Macron, Vladimir Putin, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and Donald Trump's statements on peace negotiations. He also emphasizes the importance of an upcoming Supreme Court decision regarding tariffs.

FUTURE PREDICTIONS AND PREPAREDNESS: Brandon highlights the years 2026 through 2028 as periods of intense shaking and significant events, including a surprise scenario coinciding with America's 250th anniversary. He warns of five major shakings affecting the earth, finances, politics, and the church. He emphasizes the necessity for individuals to read the Bible, take spiritual authority over their lives, and evaluate their actions and financial sowing, comparing spiritual grounding to different types of soil in Oklahoma and Mississippi.

REVIVAL AND SUPERNATURAL VISIONS: Brandon describes visions of religious figures, specifically John Kilpatrick in a wheat field with a water supply coming from the Gulf, and three white doves creating a whirlwind. He predicts massive revivals and outdoor gatherings stretching from the Gulf to Minnesota, with specific hot spots in Branson, New Orleans, Tennessee, Arkansas, Nevada, Los Angeles, and Portland. Internationally, Brandon details a vision of Japan glowing with a platinum dome, and a vision of North Korea featuring a torn communist flag, oppressed citizens worshipping in silence, and a demonic reptilian barrier blocking light. He concludes by predicting a supernatural highway where individuals will be physically transported to different locations, referencing the biblical account of Philip, and envisions a massive spiritual awakening breaking through the darkness in Asia.
rawData: [December 20, 2025]-[The Lord told us it was coming it's Here now]-[https://youtu.be/4a472es4lSg]-[Well, good evening family. Good morning to those around the world, wherever you are from. Thank you for joining us again tonight. I am going to go over some of the things that we received in prayer last time we were with you. I have taken the time to pray over what the Lord showed us last time, and it is still very intense. So, we will go over it and we will show you some of the things that Braden found in the news the last 24 hours or so. Mommy can read that book. She is coming. She will go over some of these prayer notes if we want. Are you ready? Okay. I will let you in here. Move that camera back. You can come this way. No, I don't want you. You are good. I will move over here, babe. I am sorry. It is my fault for coming late. It is okay. There you go. Hi everybody. Hello everybody. Okay, so last prayer. Was that not amazing? When we were praying last time and we were in the middle of communion and the Lord showed up, I started seeing over New York and Times Square and the terrorist attacks and all the things that the enemy is planning against this nation. I really believe with all my heart the Lord has called us to stand against this and to pray. But before I go over all that, I want to show you what Braden found today per what is going on in Paris. Can you play that now, or which one? The one where they canceled everything. Oh yeah, that was a very strong clip. I agree wholeheartedly. You know what? This is what the Holy Spirit warned us was coming, and it is very sobering. You know, when you see these things coming way before they happen and the Lord tells us pressure is coming even more. What did we hear from the Holy Spirit? What was it, how many nights ago, when he said after this comes there will be more gun laws? They will push more and take away even more freedoms. It will come even to social media. They will start to take away your right to freedom of speech more and more on public platforms and things like that and it will crack down. This was coming to Canada, England, and Australia big time in 2026. But I saw another major event like what happened in Sydney in Toronto, Canada, and the Lord showed us all these things, ladies and gentlemen. I want to tell everybody we are the news. The Holy Ghost is telling us what is happening. If people in the world want to know what is coming, come over here and pray over this stuff and we can stop it before it happens and intercede. Now, not all things are going to be stopped. We know we are in the signs of the times. We are in the last days. We know Jesus Christ is coming. Because of the birthing pains and all the things that the word of God says is coming, the world needs to know. So we are going to be that light in the darkness shining bright everywhere we go so that people see us and they say there is something different about you. So here we have Australia PM. Do you have that on there? Yeah. Australian prime minister announces crackdown on hate speech. So where are you going to crack down on hate speech? You are going to do it on social media just like the Lord told us. And I have the videos. If anybody is a follower of our channel, they know what the Holy Spirit has been saying, and it is all to His glory. Accuracy is important. We do not want flakiness. Here we go. Now you can play this. Is that a video, son? This one? Yeah. About, oh we already played it, did we not? Yeah, I already played it. Okay. So, that is more about Paris and Hong Kong, other major cities canceling or changing New Year's Eve plans because they know that they are not safe. They know they are getting tips, but they are not telling the public what is coming. What did I tell you all where I went in the spirit this last video? Is there any more? I can go to what the Lord showed us. Yeah, you can go. We know people are fed up. I told you when I saw the persecution coming to Canada in the days ahead, I saw great persecution coming to the church. I don't know if they have a First Amendment right there like in America, but whatever right they have of freedom of speech in Canada, it is about to be challenged majorly for social media and hate speech. I saw a press coming on the people in Australia and England, a fresh olive oil was coming out of this, and that is what I warned you the Holy Spirit was saying to us to get prepared, a waking shaking, and even when the Lord said to us about the volcanoes going off in the Caribbean, he said, "You are seeing into the future." He has never said that. So, I don't know how far that is away, but he said, "You are seeing into the future what is coming. This is not now. This is like next year or whatever. I don't believe he was saying this is coming. I am letting you have a glimpse of what is coming." So we see this stuff and it is amazing. Look at all these tractors. Can you see all those tractors? They are taking their tractors and using them against the police. Those police need to get out of the way. They are in danger. That looks like mayhem. I did not even know this stuff was going on until Braden showed me. I said, "What is going on in this world? We are using our tractors to run the police over. That is crazy. These people are nuts." We do not want harm to happen to anybody; it is sad that we have come to this right now and people are getting that angry and using their farming equipment to run people over. So we will pray for them tonight. But they are setting things on fire, tires, and all kinds of just filth. I am thankful that has not happened in America, but did anybody know that stuff is going on? I did not until Braden showed me. Okay. Number two, what else? So, is that all you want to show us, son? Yeah. That is good. Okay. So, when I was in the spirit, I had communion in my hand last time, and as I was about ready to take the blood, I was seeing over into New Year's Eve, and the Lord warned us about major cities in America. Now, I will go into detail concerning what the Lord showed us last video. I saw detail into New York. A major attack planned in New York for New Year's Eve. Pray over New York and New Year's Eve in New York. Praying over Miami. I saw a major attack in Miami planned. It was on the strip. I know it was a strip and people called it out and told us what it was now. And that was not West Palm Beach. Goodness gracious, I forgot the name of it. I don't live in the area. Jackson, is that it? No, I am talking about Miami. Oh, is it some kind of place like the town something place? I don't know. But there were so many people that reached out and said, "Hey, Braden, this is the place." Now, again, the water was on the, the ocean was on this side. I saw a road and then I saw a lot of eating areas. And the Lord said this was a target in Miami. So, praying over Miami, I saw that. Then I saw New Orleans again. I saw a major attack coming to New Orleans on Bourbon Street again. I saw it was a target where the horse is and the old church. What? Jackson Square. Jackson Square with the beignets and the Lord said, "This is an area that will be a hot spot. Pray over this area." I saw a mass shooting event taking place in this area when people were not sober. He talked about the Sugar Bowl, and the Lord said to intercede for the Sugar Bowl. The Sugar Bowl is on January 1st or 2nd, and the Lord said to pray for intercession and protection over the people of New Orleans. The other part the Lord showed us was Las Vegas, Nevada. I saw Las Vegas, Nevada, near Reno—where the Bellagio is and all the fountains—praying over that again, and Trump Tower and Trump Hotels. The other one the Lord showed us was Rodeo Drive in the Los Angeles area. I saw the Louis Vuitton store, which was very specific, Burberry, and the Christmas tree. I told Diana, 'The visions we had in this last prayer time were so detailed. I could even see their eyes, the skin, all of it.' Usually, faces are blurred out, but this was so detailed. I believe it's because of how intense this situation is; we must pray for security and stability over our nation, for our president, for our law enforcement, our local sheriff's departments, the FBI, and Homeland Security. The Lord showed us again: 'Hold fast, Church. Hold fast, Church. We must hold fast.' He said there's a shaking coming to America. I believe we can stop a lot of it, especially by praying in advance over our nation and protection over our New Year's Eve parties. Then I saw Europe again, and the Lord showed me England with the big Ferris wheel, praying over the Ferris wheel and Big Ben, interceding for London, England. I saw a black swan going down the river by the Eiffel Tower, floating on top of it. It was a massive black swan, the size of a boat. There are no black swans the size of a big boat; it would look like a ferry, like one of those massive New Orleans boats. It was a massive black swan swimming down that river, and I could see smoke in the distance from the Eiffel Tower area with something on fire. I thought, 'What is that representation of? Why did the Lord pick that?' The Lord said to pray over Salt Lake City and said they're casing. I saw them casing Six Flags Over Texas in the Arlington area. They were casing the area, megachurches, and the Vatican. One in particular was a megachurch in Houston; I saw them casing it, watching for the opportune time. They were casing the Vatican and major synagogues—major buildings in Europe with the Catholic faith—to cause massive destruction with all-at-the-same-time planned attacks. That's why I saw to pray over Christmas Eve next week, praying over midnight Christmas Mass with the Pope. Salt Lake City, Utah. I recognized it because Salt Lake City has the beautiful lake. I saw the Mormon temple; major Mormon temples were a target. I saw Macron, but then I saw Hillary. Then I saw a man with black glasses and a crew cut—military-style haircut—with a black trench coat, walking in Europe. The Lord said, 'She's lost her influence, but she hasn't lost it all.' Regarding the housing market, I saw them trying to stimulate the economy through the housing markets. They would try to lower interest rates to a point where the housing market would be a boom again, but it was a pig with lipstick. The Lord says, 'Brandon, the dollar's in trouble. The American economy is in trouble.' Regardless of saying the economy is booming or interest rates are better in 2020, he will stimulate it, and it will be a shallow wave. Everything will look really good, and they'll turn the printing presses on. I saw the wave cresting, and the Lord said, 'Ride the wave, for it won't last long. I'm giving you a window of opportunity in the days ahead to ride the wave for those that have ears to hear how to invest.' As the wave was going, there were crypto symbols, gold, silver, and the housing market. It was a shallow wave, light blue like the Caribbean, meaning shallow water. It will not last a long time. The Lord warned us of this, but He said, 'Ride the wave.' And as it crashed, I saw gold thickening up on the ground. He said, 'Fill your pockets, son, and use it for my Kingdom.' These are things He said: 'When you least expect it, not when you're expecting it. The surprise to open your eyes, looking for the great implementation of it, watching for the right opportunity.' Regarding the casing, He said, 'The alarm to do more harm.' 2026 will be a year like the body of Christ has never experienced. Everything is coming to a head, looking like a boil ready to pop. There's that much pressure built up that it's ready to go off. It's disgusting, but there's so much infection and so many things happening. And that's what he said: the acceleration of things like you've never seen before. The body of Christ must be ready. He said you must know your authority. He keeps saying, "Expect the unexpected." It is a pivotal year to take seriously because of the elections. And he said this is vital: the Supreme Court and the decision they make against the tariff is vital for the lifeblood of the American economy. This is not a "what if it doesn't happen" situation. This is do-or-die. This is very serious, and so that's what we will continue to pray over. I saw a scale of one to 10 of how serious it was. Was that Hillary? Was that her power? A two out of 10. She has lost a lot of influence. She's in the background. She had a scale of 10 before when she was with Obama, but now she's lost her power. She still has some, but it was a two out of 10. And the Lord said she still has influence. She still has power, especially in Europe, because I saw Macron and I saw these people of the deep state, dark people. I'm telling you all, there are some very dark people in Europe, and for what the Lord has showed us even about Germany and things that are coming. So we see Putin having meetings and he is really fussing. There are things that are happening and he's upset. Braden, did you have that video from him of some of the things that he's saying? Zelensky, they say that I think President Trump said last I heard we had a 90% chance of peace. Now, what does that involve? Dividing the land of Ukraine and giving some to Russia? I don't follow all the news and stuff. A 90% chance of peace is what President Trump was saying. I thought that was kind of interesting; they were saying it's the closest they've ever been. So, we just go over these things with you. There are a lot of you that don't want to pray with us that long. Did you see anything on Warner Brothers? There was something about Warner Brothers. I thought the Lord said it was after you said a "casing of cool place," so I didn't know. Oh, no. It was Six Flags because it was a target. They were casing Six Flags to see who had the least security. How could they infiltrate with their evil? And he said the surprise will open your eyes. Then I saw the number 250, and that was concerning America's anniversary. And the Lord said, "Don't just focus on the time frame of July 4th when we celebrate or all the things about it. It's the days prior." It's the enemy within. It's the Red Dawn experience. It's like Pearl Harbor; we were caught off guard when you least expect it. That's what the Lord kept saying: "When you least expect it, expect it." Don't let your guard down. Keep vigilant, church. How many times has he warned us? Keep your eyes open, church. You must know the signs of where we are. We're in dark towers. And most people say, "Brandon, I don't believe that." Look around you. I'm into being positive and having faith and believing God for things, folks, but look around you at where we are. From September 23rd to where we are right now, it's a different world. It's accelerating just like the Father told us. And he said, "Look, the birthing pains are intensifying. You must open your eyes." 2026 is going to be a year that you're not going to ever forget. I keep praying into it. I wake up and I see it. I have visions when I'm driving around and I don't even expect it. The Lord will speak about 2026 and I'll see it, looking in the spirit. I'll have an open-eye vision as I'm driving, and I'll stop and have her record it. We'll go over what the Lord is showing us about the economy, about investments, and things like that, just believing God for the overflow and getting ready for 2026, 2027, and 2028. Most people say, "Well, I believe the rapture of the church is coming in 2026, Brandon, we're out of here." I pray you're right, but I believe you're wrong. If you're following someone else and not the Holy Ghost, you're in trouble. You have to find God for yourself. I don't care what Prophet Billy Bob said down the road. You must find God for yourself. Quit listening to all of the prophetic chatter. What did God say to you? I'm never going to say someone is a false prophet publicly like that. The Lord rebukes me every time. I got in trouble for mentioning that one girl. Lord said, "That's not for you to do. I didn't say for you to say that stuff publicly. I talk to you privately." It's like her telling me something privately and I come on here and say, "Hey, Diana said this, everybody." But she didn't tell me to say that publicly. We have an intimate relationship and you don't share some of that stuff. And the Lord said, "Brandon, we have an intimate relationship and I want that level of trust with you. I'll tell you what things to say, but you are not going to say some of the things you said." And I had to remove it and I got in trouble. And then the Lord said, "That's not necessary, Brandon. I got it in my time." I said, "How did I do?" "You messed up." "How?" "You shouldn't have said that. I said this to you privately, but that was not for public." So, for those that heard it, I apologize to you. I'm a work in progress, y'all; I mess up. And the Lord said, "You'll grow, and you'll be sensitive." But there will be a lot of things in the days ahead that you will not be able to tell the public. So I tell you what I can say, but it's a learning process. All glory to Jesus for his patience with me. This is like I'm standing underneath a fire hydrant with all this stuff going on. And he said, "Get ready for 2026." There are going to be very, very sobering days ahead, ladies and gentlemen. And I just want to encourage you to get into the Bible yourself. Read the Bible. Stop thinking you have to have a word from somebody else. If your pastor gives it to you from behind the pulpit, listen: he's the shepherd of that congregation. If you can't trust your pastor to feed you spiritually, then why are you there? It's time for you to move on. Well, I don't get anything there. Then why are you there? If you can't trust what they're saying, you're in the wrong church. So I'm trying to encourage you: you must find God for yourself. There are so many people saying, "What do you feel, Brandon? What is my opinion?" Really, it doesn't matter what my opinion is. What is God saying to you? That's what I want to keep going to. What is God saying to you? Well, I don't hear God. No, I truly believe you do hear God; you just have too much clutter. You're going too fast down the highway at 80 miles an hour and you're not taking the side roads where Jesus is at. He wants to look at the flowers and the birds. He likes to be like George Washington Carver, who talked about the man who talks to the flowers and the peanut. It's just like taking time and praying over things, not being in such a hurry to throw out another video, but stopping and listening. There are only 100,000 people who watch that; there are 500,000 others that need to see it. This is very serious. I don't know if it's my title or whatever. I put a certain title on there and YouTube flagged it and told me to change it. This is exactly what I told you was coming. The Lord said, "Great days ahead concerning suppression and censorship." They'll censor you on Facebook. They'll censor you on YouTube. They're going to censor you on Instagram and even more on TikTok. But He said Elon's site will be a place that will harbor people. You can speak what you want, but they're going to attack him in Australia and England with lawsuits in the days ahead to shut him up. And we must pray that he will not succumb to all of the pressure from society, because it will come from Asia even more so. I don't know how many people are able to look in Asia—I saw a lot of freedom of speech coming to a halt. That's why the Lord said, "You must develop two platforms. You're focusing on all these platforms, but I'm telling you, a storm's coming with what you're allowed to say." It was a wakeup call to us when we put the title. It was a very simple title and YouTube flagged it and said basically we had to change it. I thought it wasn't that bad, but it was to them and it's their platform. We're in their house, so we obey. We're on their thing right now, and I pray I'll be able to talk like this for a while. But if something was to happen, I need you to hear me: I'll be on X. That's what the Lord said. He talks about X all the time. He talked to me about X in my sleep. It's very interesting. You all will know because we'll put the link in the description below. If anything is to happen to my channel, I'm on X. I encourage you to follow me there. I'm going to put a lot more content on there in the days ahead that I will not put on YouTube because I know what's coming. Don't go searching because there might be a lot of impersonators. Only follow the link in the description and follow me. I think I'm up to 35 or 40. It's a lot less than I thought on X. It was bigger on TikTok—definitely got like 400. I can't stand TikTok; TikTok is from the devil. But I encourage you to grow. Follow my X. I want to put a lot more stuff over there because if something happens to my YouTube, you'll find me on X because I believe that will be a safe haven for a while. But we'll be here until then. I'm just saying I know what the Lord has said: prepare. When you see the future and the Lord's showing you a storm—2027, 2028—and you're seeing into these time frames, the Lord starts showing me these. We've been doing this for three years and we're still not at a million, even though we hit this hard every day. We give all glory to God. But when the Lord says, "I want this to be your alternative," it's going to take a lot of prayers. We can't do this on our own. There is so much that the Lord has for us to pray about. It's very concerning to me where people are following Sister Whoever or Brother Whoever, and it's the blind leading the blind. That's literally where they are prophetically. They don't hear God. If He walked in with a huge red hat with "HG" for Holy Ghost on the hat and a holy angel choir behind Him, they wouldn't know Him. It's sad to me because the more this grows, you realize how many people truly have no clue and they pretend they do. They put on a good front, act like they've got it all together, and they might have a brand new private jet. You look at them and go, "You haven't had a fresh word from God in decades. What gives? Why are you preaching?" I'm telling you there is so much God is doing, and that new wine skin with that new wine flow from the Holy Ghost is not stagnant. When you're attached to the life source, the life source is always giving you fresh manna. He doesn't want His kids having spoiled porridge. "Here, let's feed that to the body of Christ; open wide." And you're choking on it. "That's trash. Why are you feeding me this nasty meal?" "But it's all you've got, buddy. Here, it's Sloppy Joes." You're choking on the Sloppy Joes. "How about some extra sloppy for you?" It's sad, but true. There's so many that think, "Well, this is a good meal," and you're looking at it going, "This is trash." I'm just real with you, and I'm fed up with it. I'm here as a watchman on the wall yelling: "You better get your act together, church." The Lord said, "I'm drawing you to my side. I'm drawing them to a higher level. You must come up higher." He says that all the time. There is a storm on your shore today. I'm calling the church to come up higher, for the world needs to see authentic. He said, "I'm not after the church, Brandon; I'm after the world. I'm leaving the 99 to go after the one." He said, "You're so focused on the churched; I'm not after the churched. I'm after the unbeliever." That's what He told me today: "I'm after the unbeliever, Brandon. I'm after the world, the ones that are dark and lost." He said, "I'm snatching them out of the pit." As I was driving, I passed a car dealership. He was looking at the people and said, "Do you see them?" He says, "I'm leaving the 99 to go after the one." Do you understand where we are right now, Brandon? I'm not coming after the church people; I'm coming after the world. But so many people are so focused on the church. And he said, "It's time for them to wake up. Put your big girl pants on and your big boy pants on, and let's get this job done so we can get out of this hellhole." I mean, I'm just saying. Most people go, "Well, we occupy until he comes." Well, my God, I know that, but let's do it and do it better. Put your armor on. Let's get this job done. Let's win the lost for Jesus. When I saw the Father standing, I said, "Lord, what are you doing?" I saw a big bright light and he was looking at the coast of America. He was on the West Coast, looking toward it, and I saw Jesus underneath the hoopa. It was beautiful olivewood, carved with all these beautiful olive leaves. It was beautiful, but he was a flaming fire and he said, "I'm waiting on you to get the job done. Bring in the lost and I'm coming for you." I stopped and I said, "He's waiting on us. We're not waiting on him. He's waiting on us. He's already given us everything. We're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. We already have the authority of the believer." He tells me, "Brandon, I'm not doing anything else about the devil." Because I was attacked one night when we were doing a livestream. That's why I stop sometimes. When you have people on the other side doing things against you, I said, "Lord, why don't you do something about that?" He said, "I'm not doing anything. Do you remember what Brother Hagin said? What I told him? I've done everything I'm going to do about the devil. You take your authority and rise up, Brandon." Immediately stop and rebuke it and tell it to go. I'm not doing anything else about the devil. I've already done it. I've already whipped him once and for all. Either you believe it or you don't. And either you walk in the authority of the believer and take your dominion in place or you don't. But I can't make you do it. You have to do it. Either you bite it like a dog on a bone or you sit there and let the devil run roughshod over you and take what belongs to you. Either you stand for your children or your wife and you pray over them and you anoint them with oil, or you don't. "Well, why is the Lord not helping me? I don't understand why I'm going through this storm." You must speak to the storm. You're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. He lives on the inside of you and he's not doing anything else about the devil. He's not. And most people don't want to hear that. But he said, "I've given you dominion and power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means harm you. Either we believe it or we don't." And that's why he talks to me about it, because I want to say, "Why are you letting this happen?" Nope. It's your fault. I gave you everything you need to be successful. If you have a need, you sow a seed. "Well, I'm dealing with finances." Check your ground. I talked to a family member about that. Check your ground, who you're sowing to. There might be corruption in their ministry. Check how you're sowing. Check what doors you have open. If you have doors of sin open in your house, the enemy comes in to kill, steal, and destroy. And the Bible says that God has come that we might have life and life more abundantly. And most people don't want to take the responsibility to look at themselves and say, "Listen, do I have open doors of sin and where am I giving?" And they want to blame it on God, saying, "Why am I still living in poverty, Lord? It doesn't work." Well, it does work. Just like if I go outside and plant an apple tree next to the ocean, it's not going to do very well. I have to plant it in the farmlands of Oklahoma and put it in some good dirt. The red dirt down south doesn't work well. You have to plant it in the better dirt. Like in Tulsa, there's really black dirt here. That's good dirt and the trees are massive. But if I go south, the trees aren't as good; they're like sagebrush trees. They're not really thick. Soil matters. Where are you sowing your seed? It matters. Stop sowing into bad ground expecting good fruit. You must learn this. And most of the body cries, "Well, you know, I've been sowing here and doing that." I'm telling you, it's ignorance. Most people are just ignorant. And you go, "Hey, I try to help you," but then we blame God. "How come we're broke? How come we're this? How come we're that?" Well, you're sowing into bad ground. It's not good ground like manure. You're sowing into ground that's like the red dirt or clay, and it just doesn't produce like it should. Mississippi black dirt produces some good crops. You know, you've got some good soil, and there is a big difference between that soil and Oklahoma red dirt. And anybody that lives in Oklahoma and lives by the Red River, you know exactly what I'm talking about. That soil does not produce very well. There's not a lot of good stuff in it. And I know the difference now between the Arkansas River soil and the red dirt, and there is a big difference. I'm just trying to help y'all. It's just common sense. But a lot of people don't put it together that way. And then if you let the devil in—you've got sin, you're looking at porn, you're drinking, acting crazy—and you're going to say, "Well, I don't understand why my life's falling apart." Because you allowed the devil in by an inch and he took a mile. He comes to steal, kill, and destroy. You let the devil in. Stop being stupid.
